narrative:
Joseph Badger Local Sd (Trumbull) school district has 4,174 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.0 percentage points.
